emails.subject: IT Contract
emails.body: IT Contract Amelia, Can you check on contract 96021047 to see if this is any current transport activity on this contract. This contract was never executed. Reliant HL&P informed me that this contract is no longer being used and they would prefer to terminate or void this contract.

emails.subject: IT Contract
emails.body: IT Contract Amelia, Can you check on contract 96021047 to see if this is any current transport activity on this contract. This contract was never executed. Reliant HL&P informed me that this contract is no longer being used and they would prefer to terminate or void this contract.

emails.subject: Re: IT Contract
emails.body: Re: IT Contract I have checked Unify Service Verifications and there is no activity on this contract. I also checked with the File Room for documents because there is a reference in the Core Main comments section of the Global record referring to an unexecuted amendment that extended the primary term and added evergreen language. There is no record of documents reaching the File Room. aa
